title: Rebuilding My Portfolio From Scratch - Every Design Decision Explained
excerpt: Why the portfolio needed to communicate full-stack engineering and creative direction in the first ten seconds.
content:
The problem

Most portfolios make visitors work too hard. I wanted DarkWing Studio to answer the important questions immediately: who I am, what I build, and why the creative side matters.

The structure

The home page leads with a direct hero, a terminal bio, and a bento grid that points to projects, writing, and the current build. Every later page expands one of those promises.

The visual system

The design uses a dark interface, restrained purple accents, compact cards, and readable mono typography. The goal is cinematic without becoming slow, noisy, or hard to scan.

What I would improve next

The next version needs deeper case-study metrics, a final resume PDF, and more screenshots from production builds.
